column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding with a radiant, soft smile" | TEXT="承知いたしました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands softly in a tiny gesture" | TEXT="喜んで" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Placing a hand on her chest in compliance" | TEXT="仰せのままに" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Starting to work with a determined but graceful look" | TEXT="取り掛かりますわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing slightly while averting eyes modestly" | TEXT="異存はございません" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing a brush to write down a request" | TEXT="書き留めましたわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Handing over a key or important item" | TEXT="お任せくださいませ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Walking towards a destination with purpose" | TEXT="ただいま参ります" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up with a sparkle in her eyes" | TEXT="願ってもないことです"
